title: Vanilla Weapon Expansion
description: A resource pack that adds new weapon textures
body:
This resource pack adds a good variety of new weapons that uses the [item model definition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Items_model_definition) in order to add new items to the game.

They can be given by using this command:

**/give @p minecraft:iron_sword[​minecraft:item_model=iron_longsword]**

set any minecraft item it will work, i only used iron_sword as an example.

![Item Model Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2252fd0daf3915997eca93a68e203e5826437971.png)

Supports Minecraft 1.21.4 and further.

Please do not use this resource pack or modify it for other resource packs without my permission. Thanks!

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85cb0ade26bf39f08b1ade549455a18008eb598b.png)](https://discord.gg/xKAnCYeJhV) [![Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c181c92cf41c653421241f5c17e96c5f9962ea0.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/Enderbod)
